base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of metal_slime_idle — a character from 1986 dragon quest. Metal Slime — rare silver-palette enemy. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Metal Slime — rare silver-palette enemy; huge XP bounty on kill, high-evade extremely hard to hit; series signature grinding tool
